rationale: Career is entirely non-ML: Civil Engineer at Infosys (IT services) and Business Analyst at Pied Piper (fictional company), with no production AI/IR experience and only surface-level recent curiosity about GenAI tools.

Marketing Manager at Wipro with a non-technical career history (customer support lead, mechanical design BA at Initech — a fictional company), zero engineering or ML work despite a Ph.D in Computer Engineering listed.

Despite 10.5 years of experience, the entire career spans IT services support (Wipro), enterprise sales, accounting at Pied Piper (fictional), and customer support — no ML, no IR, and no engineering depth whatsoever.

Business Analyst at Dunder Mifflin (fictional company) with an M.Sc in Commerce; despite GANs listed as an advanced skill, the actual career shows only business analysis and marketing operations with zero AI engineering evidence.

Only 1.7 years of experience as Customer Support at Initech (fictional company) with content-writing background; BITS Pilani and Anna University education provides potential, but there is no production ML or IR work to speak of.

IIT Bombay M.Tech ML with 4.6 years at Unacademy (product company) doing time-series forecasting and MLOps is a solid engineering foundation, but lacks any production retrieval, ranking, or search system experience that the role specifically demands.

Only 2 years of experience as a Frontend Engineer at Wipro (IT services) with self-learner AI exposure and a small RAG side project; the claimed PEFT advanced skill is not supported by any production ML work in the career history.

Senior Data Scientist at Ola (product company) who shipped XGBoost/LightGBM ranking models for a discovery feed, with advanced FAISS and embeddings skills and expert-level Hugging Face Transformers experience from IIT Delhi — strong alignment with ranking and retrieval requirements despite slightly short tenure at 4.1 years.

Nine years of backend/DevOps/frontend engineering across Wayne Enterprises and Dunder Mifflin (both fictional companies) with only self-learner AI exposure; strong software fundamentals but no production ML or IR experience and multiple honeypot signals.

Senior NLP Engineer with 6.8 years at Microsoft, Paytm, and Saarthi.ai who built a production RAG ranking pipeline at 50M+ queries/month using BM25 + dense hybrid retrieval (BGE/FAISS HNSW), owned NDCG-based eval frameworks, and has QLoRA fine-tuning expertise — from IIT Delhi, this profile is a near-exact match for every hard requirement in the JD.
